message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor User
participant "RegistrationService" as rs
participant "RegistrationRepository" as rr

User -> rs: createUser(name, pass)
activate rs
rs -> rr: save(User)
activate rr
rr --> rs
deactivate rr
rs --> User
deactivate rs

User
participant "RegistrationService" as rs2
participant "RegistrationRepository" as rr2

@enduml
